function.name: unicast_client_stop_cb
function.signature: static void unicast_client_stop_cb(struct bt_bap_stream *stream, enum bt_bap_ascs_rsp_code rsp_code, enum bt_bap_ascs_reason reason)

bug.description: race condition on shared data accessed from multiple threads without synchronization

prompt:
There is a race condition on shared data accessed from multiple threads without synchronization downstream of function unicast_client_stop_cb in the tests/bluetooth/tester subsystem.
The function is located at tests/bluetooth/tester/src/audio/btp_bap_unicast.c:934.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
